title: What happened at Epstein's mysterious New Mexico Zorro Ranch? 'Macabre and strange' claims surface
summary_full: Authorities are now scrutinizing Jeffrey Epstein's Zorro Ranch in New Mexico following disturbing claims of a "baby factory" and the burial of victims. Local radio host Eddy Aragon's investigation into an anonymous tip about "macabre and strange" activities has prompted a significant police search of the property, which was recently sold.
